CustomField.description: Whether this acknowledgment sends automatically or requires reviewer approval first, resolved by the router from Acknowledgment_Rule__mdt. All printed letters are Approval-Gated. JSI-87 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto = sends without review. Approval-Gated = a reviewer must approve before it goes out. Set by the router.
CustomField.label: Acknowledgment Send Mode
